_comment: MFPS gesture map for patches/uat-mfps.ini (Phase 10 capstone). Rack row: master | p2b8 | b32 | m4 | m4. 'module' is the generic vcvoid slug from modules.json; the runner resolves it to the actual Rack module id assembled for that row position. paramId ints per docs/uat/driving/modules.json (cite plugin/src/<Module>.cpp). 'desc' is copied from patches/uat-mfps.ini's own header comments (the patch's single source of truth for what each control does). Gestures: tap (holdMs 300), longpress (holdMs >=1500 threshold; use 1800 — the runner verifies each longpress fired via the /watch endpoint and retries, so no extra margin is needed), chord (hold modifier's holdMs, tap the primary control inside that window).

CTRL.label: B1.8
CTRL.desc: [CTRL] Switch some of the button functions

CTRL.label: B1.8
CTRL.desc: [CTRL] Switch some of the button functions

PRESET_A_SAVE.label: B2.1
PRESET_A_SAVE.desc: [Preset A] Ctrl: Switch to preset A, long press: save to preset A

PRESET_A_LOAD.label: B2.1
PRESET_A_LOAD.desc: [Preset A] Ctrl: Switch to preset A, long press: save to preset A
PRESET_A_LOAD.note: load is wired b = B2.1 * _CONTROL with _CONTROL = B1.8 (CTRL) -- a bare tap on B2.1 evaluates B2.1*0=0 and silently does nothing (the 2026-07-12 false FAIL). Drive as: hold CTRL (holdMs 1500), then within that window tap B2.1 (holdMs 300).

PRESET_B_SAVE.label: B2.2
PRESET_B_SAVE.desc: [Preset B] Ctrl: Switch to preset B, long press: save to preset B

PRESET_B_LOAD.label: B2.2
PRESET_B_LOAD.desc: [Preset B] Ctrl: Switch to preset B, long press: save to preset B

PRESET_C_SAVE.label: B2.3
PRESET_C_SAVE.desc: [Preset C] Ctrl: Switch to preset C, long press: save to preset C

PRESET_C_LOAD.label: B2.3
PRESET_C_LOAD.desc: [Preset C] Ctrl: Switch to preset C, long press: save to preset C

CLR.label: B2.4
CLR.desc: [CLR] Short press: reset play mode, with CTRL: clear track, long press factory reset

LUCK.label: B2.10
LUCK.desc: [LUCK] Randomly change step buttons, if Ctrl is held, change the gates instead.

RST.label: B2.11
RST.desc: [RST] Reset current track (Ctrl: all track) to step 1 immediately

START.label: B2.12
START.desc: [START] Start/stop sequencer - start also does reset

CLK.label: B2.14
CLK.desc: [CLK] Menu for clock speed and swing

RATC.label: B2.17
RATC.desc: [RATC] Number of sub gates per clock

COPY.label: B2.24
COPY.desc: [COPY] Copy current page of current track. With CTRL: Paste

fader_paramId._comment: m4 instance 1 = steps 1-4, m4 instance 2 = steps 5-8, per modules.json m4 layout.
